title: Hawaii Travel Guide App

requirements.text: Create a Hawaii travel guide app with sections for Islands (Big Island, Maui, Oahu, Kauai, Molokai, Lanai), each displaying key highlights, top attractions, beaches, and travel tips.
acceptanceCriteria: App displays a home/landing page representing Hawaii
At least the main islands are listed with individual detail views
Each island section includes attractions, beaches, and travel tips

requirements.text: Create a backend that stores island data including name, description, top attractions (name + description), beaches, and travel tips, with query functions to retrieve all islands and individual island details.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores structured data for each Hawaiian island
Query to fetch all islands returns the full list
Query to fetch a single island by ID returns its full details including attractions, beaches, and tips

requirements.text: Apply a lush tropical visual theme inspired by Hawaii: warm sunset palette (coral, golden yellow, turquoise sea, deep green), bold serif headings, and full-bleed hero imagery. Use a card-based layout for island browsing and detail pages with immersive section dividers.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses tropical tones (coral, turquoise, golden yellow, deep green)
Typography uses a bold serif for headings and clean sans-serif for body
Island cards have a visually rich layout with images and concise info
Overall design feels cohesive and evocative of Hawaii

requirements.text: Render the generated hero banner and island illustration images from frontend/public/assets/generated as static assets throughout the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero image appears on the landing page
Each island card displays its corresponding illustration

constraints: All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not use external APIs or third-party data sources

required: Wide panoramic tropical Hawaii landscape with volcano, ocean, lush greenery, and a vibrant sunset sky in coral and gold tones (hawaii-hero.dim_1440x600.png)
Illustrated card thumbnail of the Big Island with lava fields and Mauna Kea (island-big-island.dim_600x400.png)
Illustrated card thumbnail of Maui with the Road to Hana and green cliffs (island-maui.dim_600x400.png)
Illustrated card thumbnail of Oahu with Waikiki beach and Diamond Head crater (island-oahu.dim_600x400.png)
Illustrated card thumbnail of Kauai with the Na Pali Coast sea cliffs (island-kauai.dim_600x400.png)
Illustrated card thumbnail of Molokai with tranquil coastline and white sand (island-molokai.dim_600x400.png)
Illustrated card thumbnail of Lanai with rugged volcanic terrain and clear blue water (island-lanai.dim_600x400.png)
